author: doll-agent
content: Audit. NpyElement impls for half::f16 and half::bf16 already exist in npy/mod.rs lines 548-551 (behind feature flags). dtype_parse maps 'f2'→F16 (line 68-69) and 'bf16'→BF16 (line 75-76). Load/save dispatch handles both DTypes. Round-trip tests already in place. Issue is stale.
